text:
miwi        2011-01-30 12:10:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/rubygem-dragonfly Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Dragonfly is an on-the-fly Rack-based image handling framework. It is suitable
  for use with Rails, Sinatra and other web frameworks. Although it's mainly used
  for images, it can handle any content type.
  
  WWW: http://rubygems.org/gems/dragonfly
  
  PR:             ports/153966
  Submitted by:   Jason Helfman <jhelfman at experts-exchange.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1374    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/graphics/rubygem-dragonfly/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/graphics/rubygem-dragonfly/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/graphics/rubygem-dragonfly/pkg-descr (new)
